Moon In Pisces. A person with his moon in Pisces always takes his
dream world right into his wotking life. He thrives best in the arts of any
form of work where the imagination is an asset. He is also capable of
leading a double life or working at two different jobS. He thrives when
hugging secrets in his heart. Born with Moon in Pisces. he is able to
